data.name: Jugs Bay
data.detailed_description:
1600+ UNCENSORED ANIMATIONS

8+ Hours of Animations - Jiggle physics that make tits bounce and ass ripple. Indulge in raw, pounding sex in every filthy position imaginable with dozens of breathtaking, dripping-wet beauties from Jugs Bay—each one aching for release.

SLICE OF LIFE WITH MULTIPLE ROMANCE CHARACTERS

Follow the story of a young man as he embarks on a new chapter of his life. Leaving behind his boring old life and hometown, he restarts in Jugs Bay, a bustling town in California where every dream can come true! Date gorgeous ladies, go on adventure, enjoy the beach life, or dance the night away in the hottest nightclubs.

OPEN FOR BUSINESS

Earn money through photography, growing, harvesting, and crafting at your home. You can spend money on luxuries, advance in storylines, or even buy erotic videos.

LOVE AND SEX

In Jugs Bay, romance and passion are everywhere. Sometimes you’re the one sharing an intimate moment, sometimes you’ll see others enjoying each other, and other times it turns into a fun, steamy group experience. Game is packed with full-frontal nudity and intense, graphic sex scenes.

CHRONICLES OF CASSADRIA

Plunge into a thrilling medieval fantasy RPG, where you slay savage demons, conquer voluptuous monster girls, and befriend sultry players like the irresistible Aniel for pulse-pounding adventures! Gear up in Capital city, dominate turn-based battles against enemies, and unleash ecstasy on hot elves, busty orcs and other strange creatures.

data.short_description: A captivating adult sandbox visual novel where you meet and romance dozens of gorgeous busty women. Build relationships, enjoy intimate encounters and group scenes, explore the in-game fantasy RPG Chronicles of Cassadria, and lose yourself in a vibrant, lust-drenched world. [Adult Only, Uncensored]
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 芬蘭文, 日文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 泰文, 土耳其文
data.reviews:
“Jugs Bay is one of those games that you don't expect much from and end up surprising you.”
Lewd Games Reviewers

“The CGI and animations are commendable, creating an immersive experience.”
Zenx82, The NSFW guy's

“A very ambitious game with a ton of content and a lot of voyeurism content.”
Kilroy

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-8250U
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 12 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 1145G7
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 18 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS Big Sur 11.0
  • 處理器: Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 15 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS Big Sur 11.0
  • 處理器: Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 8 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 15 MB 可用空間
